questionText: API latency is variable & app is sluggish, How do you design UI safely?

whatWorkedWell: Correctly explained how public/private keys enable secure data transmission.
Clearly articulated that passwords can be easily compromised without encryption.
Accurately described the handshake process as fundamental to establishing security
Demonstrated understanding of how encryption protects data integrity during transit
overallTakeaways: Struggled to name other security guarantees beyond confidentiality when prompted
Could not clearly differentiate between symmetric and asymmetric encryption
Needs to practice explaining complex security concepts in simpler terms
Would benefit from studying real-world examples of security implementations

keyMoments.description: Correctly explained how public/private keys enable secure data transmission.
Clearly articulated that passwords can be easily compromised without encryption.
Accurately described the handshake process as fundamental to establishing security
